name: Calculatrice de Terrasse
seo_title: Calculatrice de Terrasse – Lames et Matériaux
seo_description: Calculez le nombre de lames de terrasse nécessaires. Entrez les dimensions et obtenez instantanément le nombre de lames, rangées et mètres linéaires.
description: Calculateur de Terrasse. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Calculateur de Terrasse. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Enter a set of numbers separated by commas
The mean is the sum of all values divided by the count
Add all numbers together, then divide by how many there are
The mean is the most common measure of central tendency
It is sensitive to outliers — one extreme value can shift the mean
mistakes: Using the mean when the data has extreme outliers — the median is more appropriate
Calculating the mean of categorical data — it requires numerical values
Forgetting that the mean of rates or ratios needs special handling (harmonic mean)
formula_display: Mean = (sum of all values) / (number of values)
